description: Rocket.Chat is open at the login screen. Log in with username 'admin' and password 'Admin1234!'. Your goal is to organize the workspace for the upcoming release cycle. Create a new public Team named 'release-management' with the description 'Coordinates all release activities and planning'. Add the existing user 'agent.user' and the existing channel '#release-updates' to this team.

metadata.target_description: Coordinates all release activities and planning
